title: OneSon's TACZ addons Modpack
description: TACZ addons for you so that you dont need to download and install them manually
body:
**Discription:**
This is a Modpack for every TACZ lover out there, who wants to play with addons but dont wants to download all the addons by themeself. currently there are only the tacz mod and the gunpack installed, so that you can choose yourself what other mods you want to play with.
maybe there will be Maps, where you can play like beeing in Black ops or something like that.

(you may run into issues with FPS Problems or pretty long loading screens)

when you have ideas for other gunpacks or something like that pls DM me on Discord or just join my discord server. (OneSon_47 and DC server is ⬇️) 


**Available Versions:**

StarWars Gunpack



**Comming soon:**

Mobius Gunpack,
Enlisted Gunpack,
Counterstrike 2 Gunpack,
LesRaisins Append Pack,


[Official Timeless and Classics Zero Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)
